description: prime = idempotent orchestrator-of-syncs (bootstrap-on-miss = retired init); sync = the synchronization primitive (terminus / named branch); trail walk landing→step(s)→terminus stop-on-revisit; config VALUES layer down the trail at read time; worktree re-materialization on prime.post. Two-tier sync (terminus every-op, topology on sync/prime).
title: §12/§13 prime + sync + federation trail
